description: Negative fixture cases for the stable publication pack gate. Each case is a complete pack that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_stable_publication_pack.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id. These cases keep the publication-narrowing and benchmark-budget-protection rejections honest even if the canonical pack changes shape.

cases.summary: A publication row whose state forces narrowing still publishes a Stable lifecycle label instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A backed benchmark publication's measured p95 exceeds its published budget without a tightened-budget waiver, so the budget-protection automation must narrow it before publication.
